The third goal by Colombia in my opinion is the best goal in the tournament so far.  That never give up attitude, the grit, the determination the effort not to let that ball go out bounce by Cucho Hernandez is at a whole different level, phenomenal, and then cross the ball to the other side perfectly to Campaz who was holding himself in the air to head that ball pass the goalkeeper was sensational, what a goal! great game.
